title: Real Peaceful Mode
description: Realize monsters' expectations, and get along well with them.
body:
# Abstract

Have you ever wondered why monsters on the continent of Minecraft always attack players indiscriminately or conditionally? It is inevitable to feel lonely and afraid while living here - the only way to survive is to keep fighting? No! Maybe fighting will make your blood spurt, maybe fighting will give you a different experience, but this is far from lively, but another kind of loneliness.

If you can achieve the wishes of the monsters, live in harmony with them, dance happily together, and run freely under the sun - this is the real peace, and this is the real lively.

This mod adds more than ten kinds of natural structures, nearly ten kinds of biological entities, dozens of blocks and items, and adds a mission system for vanilla monsters. Players can use their brainpower and technology to complete the tasks given by monsters - to defeat powerful enemies, or to search for treasures, or to produce and labor, or to find the truth of something... When the player completes all the commissions of a monster, this monster will be no longer aggressive to the player.

So, my dear adventurer, go and make this cruel and lonely world become lively!

# Hints

Use Key 'M' to show the mission lists, you'll see what to do next.

Go and find some weird structures in the world, go inside and trigger the mission, or talk with NPC to trigger.

After your finishing all the missions given by a monster, they will never be aggressive to you.
